steps.t: Aran Greenwith and Enid Nettlesting plan to meet in the centre of the Wildwood. You should travel to the designated meeting location.
Enid Nettlesting can be found at the meeting location in the Wildwood. You should talk to Enid Nettlesting.
Aran Greenwith can be found at the meeting location in the Wildwood. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
You should return to either Trestlebridge or Trader's Wharf.
